rules.label: Bevorzugter Wiederholungsbereich
rules.logic: group completed working sets into rep buckets 1-5, 6-8, 8-12, 12-15, 15-20, 20+ and rank by frequency and progress

rules.label: Übungs-Affinität
rules.logic: combine usage frequency, completion rate, progress trend and user favorites

rules.label: Stagnation erkennen
rules.logic: no meaningful improvement across 4-6 comparable sessions

rules.label: Muskel-Konstanz
rules.logic: compare weekly coverage percent against target over 4-8 weeks

rules.label: Trainingszeit-Muster
rules.logic: detect average start time and best performance windows

rules.label: Ausgelassene Split-Tage
rules.logic: compare planned workout days to completed sessions and count skipped push/pull/legs
